arts.ttl: Nacho: “In my family, we are Madrid fans for life, we will always want Real Madrid to win”
arts.sum: But this year, I don’t know, as the weeks and months have gone by, even though it’s been a year when things were going more or less well, because I think that in the whole season we only lost two games... Former Real Madrid captain Nacho Fernandez spoke about all sorts of things in a recent interview with Relevo.

arts.ttl: Dani Carvajal rates chances of Ballon d'Or thanks to trophy-laden 2024
arts.sum: Carvajal won La Liga, the Champions League and Euro 2024. Real Madrid defender Dani Carvajal has backed himself as a contender for the 2024 Ballon d'Or, having been named on the 30-player shortlist for football's top individual award.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Stuttgart injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Real Madrid and Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Sami Khedira: "Stuttgart must be brave against Real Madrid"
arts.sum: Sami Khedira has told former club Stuttgart they need to “be courageous” when they face Kylian Mbappé, Jude Bellingham and European title-holders Real Madrid in Tuesday’s UEFA Champions League opener. The former Germany international midfielder moved to Madrid at the end of that season, going on to play over 100 competitive games for Real and win both the La Liga title and the Champions League with them.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star being tested in new position ahead of Stuttgart
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has been plying his trade in an unfamiliar role in training over the last couple of days.…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Stuttgart
arts.sum: Real Madrid start their Champions League campaign with a visit from German side VfB Stuttgart on Tuesday evening. However, Ancelotti is starting to see some key figures return and here's how he could line his side up against Stuttgart midweek.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed Jude Bellingham injury boost ahead of Champions League opener
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham is set to be available for the opening game of the club's Champions League defence this week after a month out with a muscle problem. Bellingham has not featured since Madrid's first La Liga game of the season against Mallorca on 18 August, having suffered a muscle complaint in his right leg in training a few days later.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid vs Stuttgart PREVIEW
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Jose Perez discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Endrick, 18, marries woman months after signing 'relationship contract'
arts.sum: Brazil star Endrick and influencer Gabriely Miranda have tied the knot less than a year into their relationship, which already included a contract with a number of strange clauses

arts.ttl: The message Neymar reportedly sent Real Madrid stars on why Kylian Mbappe is ‘hell’ to play with
arts.sum: The French striker joined on a free transfer from PSG this past summer
